description: Labeled addresses for the Pharos Agent ecosystem. Used to flag whether a wallet in the social graph is a known contract (DEX, CEX, bridge) or an EOA. Maintainers add entries as the ecosystem grows.

addresses.label: Zero Address
addresses.note: Mint / burn address. Edges involving this are typically airdrops, mints, or self-destructs.

addresses.label: Dead Address
addresses.note: Commonly used as a burn sink.

categories.sentinel: Mint / burn / dead addresses. Edges to/from these are usually not human-to-human.
categories.cex: Centralized exchange hot wallet (label public addresses only)
